/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libllm_system.so -o libllm_system.so src/hardware/CMakeFiles/hardware.dir/cluster.cpp.o src/hardware/CMakeFiles/hardware.dir/node.cpp.o src/hardware/CMakeFiles/hardware.dir/device.cpp.o src/hardware/CMakeFiles/hardware.dir/executor.cpp.o src/hardware/CMakeFiles/hardware.dir/layer_impl.cpp.o src/hardware/CMakeFiles/hardware.dir/activation_impl.cpp.o src/hardware/CMakeFiles/hardware.dir/linear_impl.cpp.o src/hardware/CMakeFiles/hardware.dir/attention_sum_impl.cpp.o src/hardware/CMakeFiles/hardware.dir/attention_gen_impl.cpp.o src/hardware/CMakeFiles/hardware.dir/attention_mixed_impl.cpp.o src/hardware/CMakeFiles/hardware.dir/GNN_impl.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/module.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/tensor.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/module_graph.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/timeboard.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/activation.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/layer.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/layernorm.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/parallel.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/linear.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/attention.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/compressed_kv_restore.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/decoder.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/communication.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/embedding.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/route.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/rope.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/residual.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/expert.cpp.o src/module/CMakeFiles/module.dir/lm_head.cpp.o src/model/CMakeFiles/model.dir/llm.cpp.o src/model/CMakeFiles/model.dir/TF_GNN.cpp.o src/scheduler/CMakeFiles/scheduler.dir/scheduler.cpp.o src/scheduler/CMakeFiles/scheduler.dir/sequence.cpp.o  -Wl,--whole-archive src/dram/libdram.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive _deps/yaml-cpp-build/libyaml-cpp.a _deps/spdlog-build/libspdlog.a
